utterances.speaker: Tour Guide
utterances.text: That is just the way it is .

utterances.speaker: Tour Guide
utterances.text: Maybe it is crazy in a perfect world , a world without lab coats and blazers , but you not in a perfect world , you in a museum now .

utterances.speaker: Tour Guide
utterances.text: See that scientist in the classes , he and I used to play together all the time in grade school , but now ...

utterances.speaker: Tour Guide
utterances.text: Peter ! Hey , Peter ! It’s me Rhonda ! From PS ... 129 !

emotion_cause.span: 5_he and I used to play together all the time in grade school , but now ...

utterances.speaker: Tour Guide
utterances.text: I shared my pudding with you , man !

emotion_cause.span: 5_he and I used to play together all the time in grade school , but now ...

utterances.speaker: Tour Guide
utterances.text: I gave you my Snack Pack !

emotion_cause.span: 5_he and I used to play together all the time in grade school , but now ...

utterances.speaker: Tour Guide
utterances.text: See , he pretend he don’t even hear me !

emotion_cause.span: 5_he and I used to play together all the time in grade school , but now ...

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I ... I think everybody pretending they do not hear you .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Anyway , look , I do not know about you and your jackets and your separate tables , but Ross is one of my best friends , and if I save him a seat , I am telling you , he will sit in it !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Ross ! Ross ! Over here , man ! I ... I saved you seat .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: That is okay , I am cool over here . I will catch up with you later , Joey .
